compounds.frequency: 3x daily for first month, then 2x daily

benefits.description: jawline definition and neck area improvement, skin elasticity
weight loss support during Tirzepatide use

side_effects.description: significant burning and pain from first injection due to insufficient dilution (only 1ml BAC water); pain lasted at least 2.5 weeks at injection site
air bubbles in GHK-Cu solution made accurate dosing difficult

protocol_notes: Injected subcutaneously in stomach. Initial protocol used only 1ml BAC water for reconstitution which caused significant pain. Corrected to 4ml total BAC water (additional 3ml added), yielding 20 units per dose. Combined GHK-Cu injection with BPC-157 (250mcg) in single syringe to reduce injection site pain. Topical applied to face and neck using Neel brand 3% GHK-Cu product (Amazon). Confirmed legitimate copper peptide product by blue color. Applied topical 3x daily for first month, then reduced to 2x daily. Cycled topical and plans to use retinol serum during off periods as copper peptides and retinol cannot be used simultaneously. Used hyaluronic acid serum as carrier for topical application. Weight loss of approximately 12-15 lbs during 6-week period attributed to concurrent Tirzepatide use (20 lbs total loss since May). Also took Tirzepatide for weight loss management. Started 6/24/2023, stopped injections after 42 days, continued topical application. Age 58.
